title: OneHitTree
description: OneHitTree instantly breaks entire trees with one block hit. This lightweight plugin works across Minecraft 1.13-1.21, featuring configurable options and automatic leaf cleanup for efficient wood gathering.
body:
# OneHitTree - Instant Tree Chopping System 🌲

Revolutionize your wood gathering experience!

## 🔹 Description
OneHitTree is a game-changing plugin that makes tree chopping instant and satisfying. When players break just one log block, the entire tree comes crashing down! Perfect for survival servers, creative builds, and any server looking to streamline resource gathering.

## ✨ Key Features
✔ **Instant Tree Removal** – Breaks all connected logs with one hit  
✔ **Complete Leaf Cleanup** – Automatically removes connected leaves  
✔ **Universal Compatibility** – Works with MC 1.13 through 1.21  
✔ **Axe Requirement** – Optional setting for balanced gameplay  
✔ **Customizable Blocks** – Configure which blocks count as trees  

## 📥 Installation
1. Download `OneHitTree.jar` and place in your `plugins/` folder
2. Restart your server - works instantly with default settings!
3. (Optional) Edit `plugins/OneHitTree/config.yml` to customize

## ⚙️ Configuration (config.yml)
```yaml
# Basic Settings
require-axe: false  # Set true to require holding an axe

# Custom Tree Blocks
log-types:
  - OAK_LOG
  - SPRUCE_LOG
  - BIRCH_LOG
  - JUNGLE_LOG
  - ACACIA_LOG
  - DARK_OAK_LOG
  - MANGROVE_LOG
  - CHERRY_LOG
  - CRIMSON_STEM
  - WARPED_STEM

# Leaf Blocks to Remove
leaf-types:
  - OAK_LEAVES
  - SPRUCE_LEAVES
  - BIRCH_LEAVES
  - JUNGLE_LEAVES
  - ACACIA_LEAVES
  - DARK_OAK_LEAVES
  - MANGROVE_LEAVES
  - CHERRY_LEAVES
```

## 🔑 Permissions
- `onehittree.reload` – Reload configuration (op only)

## 🌟 Why Choose OneHitTree?
✅ **Time Saver** – No more tedious branch-by-branch chopping  
✅ **Satisfying Gameplay** – Watch entire trees collapse instantly  
✅ **Lightweight** – Minimal impact on server performance  
✅ **Fully Customizable** – Adapt to your server's needs  

## 🎯 Perfect For:
- **Survival Servers** – Makes wood gathering efficient
- **Creative Builds** – Quickly clear areas for construction
- **Skyblock Worlds** – Prevents floating tree tops
- **All Server Types** – Any server with tree-related gameplay

**Fast ✔ Efficient ✔ Game-Changing ✔**

🔹 Watch your players enjoy the most satisfying tree chopping experience ever!
